subject: A female-presenting figure in a blue coat holding a glowing blue crystalline device aloft on a ship deck
description: A female-presenting figure stands on or near a ship's deck, arm raised high, holding a glowing blue crystalline artifact or hourglass-shaped device. She wears a fitted blue coat with a flowing blue-purple scarf caught in the wind. Her hair is dark and cut short. Behind her, red sail fabric billows and rigging lines are visible. The sky is bright with clouds, giving the scene an open-air, seafaring quality. The glowing device dominates the foreground and emits swirling blue magical energy. The flavor text directly attributes the quote to Jhoira.
foreground: Female-presenting figure in blue coat raising a glowing blue crystalline device
background: Red billowing sail, ship rigging, bright cloudy sky
emotion: confident, purposeful; arm raised in command or casting
